name: Broccoli and Blue Cheese in Prepared Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F for 10 minutes.
2. Beat eggs until light.
3. Mix in both cheeses, pepper, and nutmeg until well mixed.
4. Stir in broccoli.
5. Set aside.
6. Place prepared pie crust in a 9-inch quiche dish.
7. Pour filling into crust.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
